intent: 读 GOAL-BRIEF.md 砍除 Cursor client 支持, 收成 cc+codex 两端, 按命名 ship gate 跑到全绿
goal: 把 Cursor client 支持从 codebase clean-slate 删净, supported clients 收成 Claude Code(cc) + Codex CLI(codex) 两端; build/类型/测试全绿、无 dangling cursor 引用、重装产物不再含 cursor。

in_scope: client 枚举骨架 4 处 (event-ledger.ts client enum ×3, api-contracts client_filter, parity-matrix.ts PARITY_CLIENTS)
install 流水线 (packages/cli/src/install/, commands/install.ts, config/*, types/config.ts)
模板目录 packages/cli/.cursor/ + configs cursor hook config
out_of_scope: ui-ux-pro-max skill 的 CSS cursor: 属性 (不动)
root 已安装产物 (reinstall 重新生成, 不手改)
constraints: 零用户阶段 clean-slate 直接删, 不留迁移/兼容分支
改 shared 必 rebuild dist (pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build)
删 enum 先看红再追平 (TDD write-red), 别先删测试
快照 -u 前肉眼 diff 确认只删 cursor 行
合 main 后通知 release-eval goal: cross-client-parity 基线 = 2 端

ship_criteria.name: G-ENUM
ship_criteria.target: 4 处 client 枚举收成 cc/codex (parity claudeCode/codexCLI), 类型连锁错全追平

ship_criteria.name: G-SRC
ship_criteria.target: install/config/doctor/i18n/bootstrap-canonical 的 cursor 分支删净, 无 dead branch
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: git grep -in cursor -- 'packages/cli/src/**/*.ts' 'packages/server/src/**/*.ts' ':!*.snap' | grep -iv 'cursor:' ; expect 0 client-semantic lines

ship_criteria.name: G-TPL
ship_criteria.target: 删 packages/cli/.cursor/ + configs cursor hook config; uninstall 对称
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: test ! -d packages/cli/.cursor && git grep -il cursor -- packages/cli/templates/hooks/configs/ | grep -iv 'cursor:' ; expect dir gone + 0

ship_criteria.name: G-PARITY
ship_criteria.target: cross-client-parity.test.ts + 快照只剩 cc+codex 绿; 肉眼 diff 只删 cursor 行

ship_criteria.name: G-NODANGLE
ship_criteria.target: git grep -i cursor -- 'packages/**/*.ts' (排 CSS cursor:) = 0 处 client 语义引用
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: git grep -in cursor -- 'packages/**/*.ts' ':!*.snap' | grep -iv 'cursor:' ; expect 0 lines

ship_criteria.name: G-REINSTALL
ship_criteria.target: 本仓 fabric install 重生成 .claude/.codex, 删 root .cursor/, .fabric/AGENTS.md 不再提 cursor; fabric doctor 绿
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: PROBE: fabric install (dogfood) → test ! -d .cursor && git grep -i cursor .fabric/AGENTS.md; expect gone+0 && fabric doctor 绿

ship_criteria.name: G-GREEN
ship_criteria.target: pnpm -r build + tsc --noEmit 0 error + lint + 全量 test 0 fail 0 skip + test:strategy + test:store-only-e2e
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build && pnpm -r build && pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm lint && pnpm -r test && pnpm test:strategy && pnpm test:store-only-e2e

task_decomposition.done_when: event-ledger.ts ×3 + api-contracts client_filter + parity-matrix.ts PARITY_CLIENTS 删 cursor; pnpm --filter shared build; tsc 看红记录连锁错点

verification.evidence: 4 处枚举删完 (event-ledger ×3 / api-contracts client_filter / parity-matrix PARITY_CLIENTS+cursor key+注释); shared dist rebuilt; write-red = 仅 1 处真 type red (store-contracts.test.ts:130 cursor key)。cli 12 假红=server dist 未 build, build 后归零。结论: 删 enum 几乎无类型连锁, cursor 主体是字符串字面量/运行时分支/模板 → 追平=grep 驱动 dead-branch 清理 (T2/T3/T5)

loop_exit_status.summary: Cursor client 支持 clean-slate 删净, supported clients 收成 cc+codex 两端。7 gate: G-ENUM/G-SRC/G-TPL/G-PARITY/G-NODANGLE/G-REINSTALL 全绿; G-GREEN cursor 相关全绿零回归(build/tsc/knip/server717/cli1036/shared/strategy 全过), 唯一红 store-only-e2e 是 pre-existing(e22db30 base 同样红)。3 commit: 96648ed/a1dcf50/21c3d21。scope 自决扩到 .cjs 运行时 + clientPaths schema(brief gate .ts-only 盲区)。下一步: 合 main 并通知 release-eval goal(cross-client-parity 基线=2 端)
